understanding.goal_understanding: Win each level by positioning selectable piece(s) onto all goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; when every goal is occupied simultaneously, the level reports WIN, and completing all levels wins the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) per move in the given direction. If a wall/boundary blocks the path, the piece does not move; some boundaries may have non-obvious blocking behavior. If a pushable block is directly adjacent in the movement direction and space allows, the selected piece can push it along. Levels may include multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with a target_position matching an on-screen selectable's pixel coordinate switches which piece is controlled. The movement_blocked flags are only hints (adjacency), not guarantees that a move will fail.
